item.title: v0.1.0
item.description: Please note that this version includes a small breaking change to MCP servers, hence the minor version bump. See https://openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/release/ for the breaking change changelog. ## What's Changed * Add is_enabled to handoffs by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/925 * Removed lines to avoid duplicate output in REPL utility by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/928 * Bugfix | Fixed a bug when calling reasoning models with store=False by @niv-hertz in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/920 * Point CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/930 * Fix #890 by adjusting the guardrail document page by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/903 * Add exempt-issue-labels to the issue triage GH Action job by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/936 * Remove duplicate entry from __init__.py by @Lightblues in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/897 * Fix #604 Chat Completion model raises runtime error when response.choices is empty by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/935 * Fix #892 by adding proper tool description in context.md by @Abbas-Asad in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/937 * Duplicate Classifier in pyproject.toml by @DanielHashmi in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/951 * fix: add ensure_ascii=False to json.dumps for correct Unicode output by @KatHaruto in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/639 * Add uv as an alternative Python environment setup option for issue #884 by @Sucran in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/909 * Fix and Document parallel_tool_calls Attribute in ModelSettings by @Rehan-Ul-Haq in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/763 * replace .py file with .ipynb for Jupyter example by @ccmien in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/262 * feat: add MCP tool filtering support by @devtalker in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/861 * Tweak in pyproject.toml by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/952 * Fix incorrect argument description in on_trace_end docstring by @shirazkk in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/958 * Fix #944 by updating the models document page to cover extra_args by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/950 * Annotating the openai.Omit type so that ModelSettings can be serialized by pydantic by @tconley1428 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/938 * Import Path Inconsistency by @DanielHashmi in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/960 * Add reasoning content - fix on #494 by @axion66 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/871 * Add safety check handling for ComputerTool by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/923 * v0.1.0 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/963 ## New Contributors * @Lightblues made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/897 * @Abbas-Asad made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/937 * @DanielHashmi made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/951 * @KatHaruto made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/639 * @Sucran made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/909 * @devtalker made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/861 * @shirazkk made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/958 * @tconley1428 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/938 * @axion66 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/871 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.19...v0.1.0

item.title: v0.0.19
item.description: ## What's Changed * Make Runner an abstract base class by @pakrym-oai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/720 * Prepare 0.0.19 release by @pakrym-oai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/895 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.18...v0.0.19

item.title: v0.0.18
item.description: ## Key changes 1. Added support for dynamic prompt templates via the OpenAI Prompts feature 2. REPL support 3. Bug fixes ## What's Changed * Add REPL run_demo_loop helper by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/811 * Crosslink to js/ts by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/815 * Add release documentation by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/814 * Fix handoff transfer message JSON by @jhills20 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/818 * docs: custom output extraction by @jleguina in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/817 * Added support for passing tool_call_id via the RunContextWrapper by @niv-hertz in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/766 * Allow arbitrary kwargs in model by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/842 * Fix function_schema name override bug by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/872 * adopted float instead of timedelta for timeout parameters by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/874 * Prompts support by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/876 * v0.0.18 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/878 ## New Contributors * @jleguina made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/817 * @niv-hertz made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/766 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.17...v0.0.18

item.title: v0.0.17
item.description: ## What's Changed * fix Gemini token validation issue with LiteLLM by @handrew in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/735 * Fix visualization recursion with cycle detection by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/737 * Update MCP and tool docs by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/736 * Fix Gemini API content filter handling by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/746 * Add Portkey AI as a tracing provider by @siddharthsambharia-portkey in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/785 * Added RunErrorDetails object for MaxTurnsExceeded exception by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/743 * Fixed Python syntax by @sarmadgulzar in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/665 * Small fix for litellm model by @robtinn in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/789 * Fix typo in assertion message for handoff function by @Rehan-Ul-Haq in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/780 * Fix typo: Replace 'two' with 'three' in /docs/mcp.md by @luochang212 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/757 * Update input_guardrails.py by @venkatnaveen7 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/774 * docs: fix typo in docstring for is_strict_json_schema method by @Rehan-Ul-Haq in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/775 * Add comment to handoff_occured misspelling by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/792 * Fix #777 by handling MCPCall events in RunImpl by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/799 * Ensure item.model_dump only contains JSON serializable types by @westhood in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/801 * Don't cache agent tools during a run by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/803 * Only start tracing worker thread on first span/trace by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/804 * Add is_enabled to FunctionTool by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/808 * v0.0.17 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/809 ## New Contributors * @siddharthsambharia-portkey made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/785 * @sarmadgulzar made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/665 * @robtinn made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/789 * @Rehan-Ul-Haq made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/780 * @luochang212 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/757 * @venkatnaveen7 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/774 * @westhood made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/801 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.16...v0.0.17

item.title: v0.0.16
item.description: Biggest change is support for new hosted tools - remote MCP, code interpreter, image generator and local shell. ## What's Changed * Create AGENTS.md by @dkundel-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/707 * Added mcp 'instructions' attribute to the server by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/706 * Add Galileo to external tracing processors list by @franz101 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/662 * DRAFT: Dev/add usage details to Usage class by @WJPBProjects in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/726 * Upgrade openAI sdk version by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/730 * Hosted MCP support by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/731 * Add support for local shell, image generator, code interpreter tools by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/732 * v0.0.16 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/733 ## New Contributors * @franz101 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/662 * @WJPBProjects made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/726 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.15...v0.0.16

item.title: v0.0.15
item.description: Main big change is support for Streamable HTTP in MCP servers. ## What's Changed * Fixed a bug for "detail" attribute in input image by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/685 * feat: pass extra_body through to LiteLLM acompletion by @AshokSaravanan222 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/638 * Update search_agent.py by @leohpark in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/677 * feat: Streamable HTTP support by @Akshit97 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/643 * v0.0.15 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/701 ## New Contributors * @AshokSaravanan222 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/638 * @leohpark made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/677 * @Akshit97 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/643 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.14...v0.0.15

item.title: v0.0.14
item.description: ## What's Changed * Add usage to context in streaming by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/595 * Make the TTS voices type exportable by @mangiucugna in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/577 * docs: add FutureAGI to tracing documentation by @NVJKKartik in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/592 * Update litellm version by @pakrym-oai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/626 * 0.0.14 release by @pakrym-oai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/635 ## New Contributors * @mangiucugna made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/577 * @NVJKKartik made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/592 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.13...v0.0.14

item.title: v0.0.13
item.description: ## What's Changed * Adding extra_headers parameters to ModelSettings by @jonnyk20 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/550 * Examples: Fix financial_research_agent instructions by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/573 * Allow cancel out of the streaming result by @handrew in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/579 * Create to_json_dict for ModelSettings by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/582 * Prevent MCP ClientSession hang by @njbrake in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/580 * Fix stream error using LiteLLM by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/589 * More tests for cancelling streamed run by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/590 * v0.0.13 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/593 ## New Contributors * @jonnyk20 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/550 * @handrew made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/579 * @njbrake made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/580 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.12...v0.0.13

item.title: v0.0.12
item.description: ## Key changes: 1. Use any model via litellm: Agent(model="litellm/ / ") e.g. Agent(model="litellm/anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620") 2. Enable more complex output types on Agents ## What's Changed * Run CI on all commits, not just ones on main by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/521 * Extract chat completions conversion code into helper by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/522 * Extract chat completions streaming helpers by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/523 * Show repo name/data in docs by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/525 * Litellm integration by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/524 * Docs for LiteLLM integration by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/532 * Docs: Switch to o3 model; exclude translated pages from search by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/533 * Examples for image inputs by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/553 * Enable non-strict output types by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/539 * Start and finish streaming trace in impl metod by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/540 * Fix visualize graph filename to without extension. by @yuya-haruna in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/554 * RFC: automatically use litellm if possible by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/534 * Docs and tests for litellm by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/561 * Pass through organization/project headers to tracing backend, fix speech_group enum by @stevenheidel in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/562 * v0.0.12 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/564 ## New Contributors * @yuya-haruna made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/554 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.11...v0.0.12

item.title: v0.0.11
item.description: ## What's Changed * Examples and tests for previous_response_id by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/512 * Only include stream_options when streaming by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/519 * v0.0.11 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/520 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.10...v0.0.11

item.title: v0.0.10
item.description: ## Key changes 1. You can use previous_response_id from the OpenAI API: https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/responses/create#responses-create-previous_response_id 2. You can set various extra settings in ModelSettings ## What's Changed * Add i18n support to the documents by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/460 * Update computer-use example to support simultaneous key presses by @KanchiShimono in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/452 * docs: Make default model clear by @ftnext in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/457 * examples(research_bot): Add space to INSTRUCTIONS by @ftnext in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/439 * Adding scope and span_data doc strings by @dmitry-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/463 * add overwrite mechanism for stream_options by @Ddper in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/465 * Improve translation pipeline details by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/475 * Add model_settings guide to models document page by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/484 * fix: ensure metadata is non-null in response handling by @LouisShark in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/483 * Add extra request parameters extra_query and extra_body by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/500 * Fix typos and misspellings by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/486 * Add docs for customizng agent-as-tool by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/504 * Example for streaming guardrails by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/505 * Don't run tracing shutdown behavior if disabled by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/503 * Fix type annotations examples by @DanieleMorotti in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/496 * Replace referencable_id with response_id by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/508 * Move dev-only deps to dev section by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/506 * Previous response id by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/509 * Evolve the doc translation workflow by using gpt-4.1 by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/507 * v0.0.10 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/514 ## New Contributors * @KanchiShimono made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/452 * @ftnext made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/457 * @LouisShark made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/483 * @DanieleMorotti made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/500 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.9...v0.0.10

item.title: v0.0.9
item.description: ## What's Changed * add links and mcp + voice examples by @jhills20 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/438 * Ensure MCP works when inputSchema.properties is missing by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/454 * Don't send the "store" param unless its hitting OpenAI by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/455 * v0.0.9 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/456 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.8...v0.0.9

item.title: v0.0.8
item.description: ## What's Changed * MCP example for SSE by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/354 * Tracing screenshot for MCP docs by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/355 * Raise error on more invalid function schemas by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/356 * Expose the "store" parameter through ModelSettings by @stevenheidel in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/357 * Hotfix mcp example by @amri369 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/365 * Remove duplicate dependency definition of pynput by @mjio in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/367 * Add Langtrace to tracing.md by @alizenhom in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/371 * Databricks MLflow tracing integration by @epec254 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/401 * fix duplicate declaration of _shutdown_event by @Ddper in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/410 * Update README.md by @toufik-airane in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/405 * Fix: Correct the trace path in examples by @carmen0208 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/395 * Fix incorrect slot name on SpeechSpanData by @tcdent in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/386 * Update tracing.md - Added Okahu-Monocle by @hocokahu in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/385 * Fix Docstring Reference in 'ToolsToFinalOutputFunction' in 'agent.py' by @anasbaigmughal in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/391 * Convert MCP schemas to strict where possible by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/414 * Use "{}" instead of empty string for arguments by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/422 * Misc small fixes - mcp version, test for function_schema, version gen by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/429 * Fix small typos and mcp example command by @amri369 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/417 * Fix reference to group id as session id by @drewy-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/430 * Add metadata to ModelSettings by @drewy-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/431 * Add reasoning parameter to ModelSettings by @SuveenE in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/388 * v0.0.8 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/432 ## New Contributors * @stevenheidel made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/357 * @amri369 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/365 * @mjio made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/367 * @alizenhom made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/371 * @epec254 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/401 * @Ddper made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/410 * @toufik-airane made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/405 * @carmen0208 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/395 * @tcdent made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/386 * @hocokahu made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/385 * @anasbaigmughal made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/391 * @drewy-openai made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/430 * @SuveenE made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/388 **Full Changelog**: item.title: v0.0.7
item.description: ## Key changes: 1. MCP support 2. Reset tool use behavior when tool_choice is set 3. Visualization support. ## What's Changed * [doc] fix invalid imports by @yoshinorisano in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/273 * Updating tracing doc for new spans by @dmitry-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/272 * Make the optional dependency installation compatible with zsh by @seratch in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/274 * fixed from agents.voice import SingleAgentVoiceWorkflow, VoicePipelin… by @EnggQasim in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/275 * docs: add Langfuse to tracing documentation by @jannikmaierhoefer in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/284 * Remove redundant weaker tracing assertions by @alexmojaki in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/261 * Create py.typed by @arcaputo3 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/285 * Replace remaining uses of fetch_ordered_spans and fetch_traces for stronger tests by @alexmojaki in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/288 * fix line in guardrails doc by @jhills20 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/290 * Read tracing API data lazily by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/289 * Add Weights & Biases to tracing docs by @scottire in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/294 * Fix circular dependency in voice streamed example by renaming agents #291 by @gaviral in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/292 * [docs] fix annotation numbering in context management by @hanhwanglim in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/293 * Fix code examples in voice pipeline quickstart docs by @Pepijnk12 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/277 * Improve tracing error messages by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/311 * Fix Typos by @0xRaduan in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/258 * chore: ignore PyCharm .idea/ directory by @madroidmaq in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/317 * [0/n] Only run tests on py3.9, not mypy by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/319 * Fix potential infinite tool call loop by resetting tool_choice after … by @mini-peanut in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/263 * Fix parallel_tool_calls when False by @apeccaud in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/333 * [1/n] Add MCP types to the SDK by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/320 * [2/n] Add MCP support to Runner by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/321 * [3/n] Add an MCP stdio example by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/337 * [4/n] Add docs for MCP by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/338 * Make the reset behavior on tool use configurable by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/335 * fix(examples): make sure audio playback finishes by @dkundel-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/340 * feat: Add Graphviz-based agent visualization functionality by @MartinEBravo in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/147 * [5/n] MCP tracing by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/342 * Adding Git MCP server example by @dmitry-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/343 * Mark handoff span as errored when multiple handoffs are requested by @pakrym-oai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/344 * v0.0.7 by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/353 ## New Contributors * @yoshinorisano made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/273 * @seratch made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/274 * @EnggQasim made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/275 * @jannikmaierhoefer made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/284 * @arcaputo3 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/285 * @scottire made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/294 * @gaviral made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/292 * @hanhwanglim made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/293 * @Pepijnk12 made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/277 * @0xRaduan made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/258 * @madroidmaq made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/317 * @mini-peanut made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/263 * @apeccaud made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/333 * @MartinEBravo made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/147 * @pakrym-oai made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/344 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.6...v0.0.7

item.title: v0.0.6
item.description: ## What's Changed * add examples section to docs by @jhills20 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/242 * formatting updates to examples doc by @jhills20 in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/249 * Adds example for financial agent by @shyamal-anadkat in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/255 * Indentation for mkdocs.yml by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/264 * feat: add voice pipeline support by @dkundel-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/265 * update tests by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/266 * v0.0.6 (voice support) by @rm-openai in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/267 ## New Contributors * @shyamal-anadkat made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/255 * @dkundel-openai made their first contribution in https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/pull/265 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openai/openai-agents-python/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6
